svg.title: Prototype disciplines mapped to migration patterns they enable
svg.desc: A two-column diagram. Left column shows prototype disciplines including domain modules, interface files, migration schema, structured logging, feature frontend, vertical slices, and ADRs. Right column shows the migration patterns each enables: Strangler Fig, Branch by Abstraction, Expand/Contract, Parallel Run, UI Composition, Extract Product Lines, and avoiding Feature Parity trap. Lines connect each discipline to its pattern.

g.text: Validate new impl on real traffic
Replace pages / widgets one at a time
